src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Removed no-argument constructors from ErrorResponse and ErrorMessage classes to enforce explicit initialization.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.human_impl: Deleted `public ErrorResponse() {}` and `public ErrorMessage() {}` methods.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Changed instance fields to final to ensure immutability after construction.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.human_impl: Added `final` keyword to `errorId`, `errors`, `path`, and `message` fields.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Added Javadoc documentation to classes and constructors to improve code clarity.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.human_impl: Added `/** ... */` blocks describing the purpose of ErrorResponse, ErrorMessage, and their constructors.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Introduce a second PostgreSQL container for the 'rolldown' database to support multi-datasource integration tests.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.human_impl: Added `rolldownContainer` field and initialization logic, exposing `quarkus.datasource.rolldown.*` properties.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Rename the primary database container fields and variables to 'mati' to distinguish it from the new rolldown container.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.human_impl: Renamed `container` to `matiContainer` and `containerNetworkId` to `matiContainerNetworkId`.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Extract the hardcoded Docker image string into a constant for better maintainability.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.human_impl: Added `private final String DOCKER_IMAGE = "postgres:13";` and used it in container instantiation.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Update the `fixJdbcUrl` helper method to accept the container instance as an argument to resolve host/port details.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.human_impl: Changed signature from `fixJdbcUrl(String jdbcUrl)` to `fixJdbcUrl(String jdbcUrl, JdbcDatabaseContainer container)`.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Add a Javadoc comment to the class to describe its purpose as a Docker container resource for integration tests.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.human_impl: Added `/** Docker container with Postgres databases to run in our integration tests */`.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Reformat the empty `stop()` method to use a single-line body style.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.human_impl: Changed `public void stop() { }` from multi-line to single-line.
